payload.message: We still have not tried switching the auth callback to cookies() yet.
You are reviewer sub-agent 2. Work read-only. Focus on docs and contract surfaces only.
Next step: update src/auth/login.ts and src/auth/middleware.ts to set an httpOnly cookie and guard the redirect.
Use bun in this repo for faster installs.
Actually use pnpm in this repo, not bun.
Redis must be running before integration tests.
We already confirmed pnpm test passes after the cookie change.
